list.name: Changes
list.comment:
chore: remove deprecated TanStack router and start skills
- Deleted the `tanstack-router`, `tanstack-start`, and `tanstack-start-best-practices` skills along with their associated files, including documentation and configuration. - This cleanup helps streamline the project by removing outdated and unused components.

task.summary:
chore: remove deprecated TanStack router and start skills
- Deleted the `tanstack-router`, `tanstack-start`, and `tanstack-start-best-practices` skills along with their associated files, including documentation and configuration. - This cleanup helps streamline the project by removing outdated and unused components.

MESSAGE.value:
chore: remove deprecated TanStack router and start skills
- Deleted the `tanstack-router`, `tanstack-start`, and `tanstack-start-best-practices` skills along with their associated files, including documentation and configuration. - This cleanup helps streamline the project by removing outdated and unused components.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
chore: remove deprecated TanStack router and start skills
- Deleted the `tanstack-router`, `tanstack-start`, and `tanstack-start-best-practices` skills along with their associated files, including documentation and configuration. - This cleanup helps streamline the project by removing outdated and unused components.
